case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR VS. RUBIN M VILLACARLOS

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VILLACARLOS, RUBIN M
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT VILLACARLOS, RUBIN M ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-27-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VILLACARLOS, RUBIN M $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.99 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.99 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY WAH-MEI LEW, SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT RUBIN M. VILLACARLOS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
